info.description:
The Iznik API powers both the Freegle user-facing site (www.ilovefreegle.org) and ModTools, which provides moderation tools to Freegle volunteers. Endpoints are tagged by which client uses them.

If you are intending to make extensive use of this API, please contact us at geeks@ilovefreegle.org.
info.title: Iznik API.

get.description: Returns the best-performing variant for a test UID using epsilon-greedy bandit

post.description: Records a shown or action event for a variant

get.description: Returns the most recent activity in groups
Returns all addresses for the authenticated user

get.description: Returns the last 5 chat messages for the earlier conversation section in AMP emails
get.summary: Get chat messages for AMP email

post.description: Submits an inline reply from AMP email using a one-time write token

Returns a single authority by ID with polygon, centre, and overlapping groups
Returns messages for a specific authority

Returns message changes (deleted, edited, promised, reneged, outcomes, approved/reposted),
user changes, and ratings since a given time. Requires partner key authentication.

parameters.description: ISO8601 or MySQL datetime timestamp (defaults to 1 hour ago)
parameters.name: since

AMPChatMessage.description: These fields are populated by enriching the base chat messages with user info.
AMPChatMessage.title: AMPChatMessage extends ChatMessageQuery with AMP-specific display fields.

AMPChatResponse.title: AMPChatResponse wraps the enriched chat messages with AMP-specific metadata.

Activity.description: Activity represents a recent activity in groups

ActivityGroup.description: ActivityGroup represents a group in an activity

ActivityMessage.description: ActivityMessage represents a message in an activity

Centre.title: Centre represents the centre point of an authority.

ChangesData.title: ChangesData contains the three collections of changes.

ChangesResponse.title: ChangesResponse is the top-level response for the changes endpoint.

ClientLogRequest.title: ClientLogRequest represents the request body for client logs.

CommentItem.title: CommentItem is a flat comment representation. Client fetches user details separately via /user/:id.

CountsResponse.title: CountsResponse is the API response for the counts endpoint.

GetMembershipsMember.title: GetMembershipsMember is the response struct for individual members in GetMemberships.

GiftAid.description: GiftAid represents a user's Gift Aid declaration

poly.description: Polygon fields (only populated when polygon=true query param)

tnkey.description: TN key fields (only populated when tnkey=true and user is moderator)

TnKeyInfo.title: TnKeyInfo holds the TrashNothing key and settings URL.

founded.description: Support-only fields (only populated when support=true and user is Admin/Support)

poly.description: Polygon fields (only populated when polygon=true query param)

GroupWork.description:
Active groups get primary fields (red badges), inactive/backup groups get
"other" fields (blue badges).
GroupWork.title: GroupWork represents per-group work counts for a moderator.

IllustrationData.title: IllustrationData contains the AI illustration details.

IllustrationResult.title: IllustrationResult is the response structure for the illustration endpoint.

LogEntry.title: LogEntry represents a single log entry returned from the API.

LogsResponse.title: LogsResponse is the API response structure.

Map.description: Map is a shortcut for map[string]interface{}, useful for JSON returns

Membership.title: This is the membership we return to the client.  It includes some information not stored in the DB.

Message.description: Message represents a posting (offer or wanted)

approvedby.description:
There's a slight privacy issue in returning the approval id.  Potentially we might not want users to know that
their messages are moderated, and we might not want to reveal the id of the moderator.  However it's a useful
thing to be able to show mods themselves.

MessagePosting.title: MessagePosting represents a posting history record from messages_postings.

ModFeedbackRequest.description: ModFeedbackRequest represents the body for PATCH /microvolunteering

Photo.description: Photo represents a photo for rotation challenge

PostRequest.description:
The operation is determined by which fields are present:
externaluid present → create new attachment
id + rotate present → rotate existing attachment
PostRequest.title: PostRequest handles all POST /image operations.

imgtype.description: Type resolution: either imgtype string or boolean flags

PostcodeStats.title: PostcodeStats represents stats for a partial postcode.

ReplyResponse.title: ReplyResponse is the response for AMP chat reply submissions.

SearchResult.title: SearchResult represents an authority search result.

SearchTerm.description: SearchTerm represents a search term for matching

WorryMatch.title: WorryMatch represents a worry word found in a message's subject or body.

WorryWord.title: WorryWord represents a row from the worrywords table.

configCreateSpamKeywordRequest.description: CreateSpamKeywordRequest model for creating spam keywords

action.description: Action to take: Spam, Review, or Whitelist

type.description: Type of matching: Literal or Regex

configCreateWorryWordRequest.description: CreateWorryWordRequest model for creating worry words

abTestResponse.description: abTestResponse is the response for A/B test variant

chatMessageCreatedResponse.description: chatMessageCreatedResponse is the response for creating a chat message

chatRoomCreatedResponse.description: chatRoomCreatedResponse is the response for creating/opening a chat room

fileResponse.description: fileResponse is the response for binary file data

genericResponse.description: genericResponse is a generic JSON response for endpoints returning fiber.Map

noContentResponse.description: noContentResponse is the response for 204 No Content

spamKeywordResponse.description: spamKeywordResponse is the response for a single spam keyword

successResponse.description: successResponse is the response for successful operations

worryWordResponse.description: worryWordResponse is the response for a single worry word
